net: upstream face_detect slim-320 SSD, create_mb_tiny_fd(2, is_test=True), eval mode
notes: confidences softmaxed over {background, face}; boxes decoded to corner form in normalized image units (center_variance 0.1, size_variance 0.2; priors clipped to [0,1] but decoded boxes may spill slightly outside); both recorded BEFORE thresholding/NMS
